summary: Expose bus_status via the teof CLI and document usage (queue/077).

steps.title: Add teof bus_status command
steps.notes: Create teof.commands.bus_status wrapper, register in CLI module list, and ensure it pipes args to tools.agent.bus_status.

steps.title: Add regression tests
steps.notes: Cover teof bus_status JSON/text output using sandboxed bus fixtures.

steps.title: Document CLI usage
steps.notes: Update docs/agents.md (and quickstart if needed) to mention `python3 -m teof bus_status` option.

checkpoint.description: teof bus_status command documented and tested
